---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the use case? A clear description of the
need helps more than a proposed solution alone.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen, including any proposed API
shape if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or prior art (e.g. how other libraries handle this)
here.
